title_en: Fever vs Aces Recap — Clutch time and possession quality
title_zh: Fever vs Aces 回顾 — 末节关键球与攻防回合质量
summary_en: Final 5 minutes decided the game: Fever slightly ahead in FTR and eFG%, while Aces controlled turnovers better.
summary_zh: 最后5分钟的关键球命中率与防守回合质量决定胜负。Fever 在 FTR 与 eFG% 上略优，但 Aces 的失误控制更稳。
highlights_en: Clutch period (last 5 min) eFG%: Fever 56% vs Aces 52%
FTR (free throw rate): Fever 0.32 vs Aces 0.28
highlights_zh: Clutch 时段（最后5分钟）eFG%：Fever 56% vs Aces 52%
storyline_en: Opening: half-court tempo, stable perimeter efficiency.
Mid-game: Aces used Horns variations; Fever responded with 5-out spacing.
Endgame: Fever drew more fouls; Aces reduced turnovers to stabilize control.
storyline_zh: 开局：两队以半场阵地战为主，外线效率平稳。
中段：Aces 以 Horns 变化撕裂弧顶，Fever 以 5-out 拉开回应。
末节：关键球回合中，Fever 更多造犯规，Aces 减少失误维持控场。
tactics_en: Aces Horns variant: weak-side flare + high screen re-entry.
Fever 5-out: clear paint, use second screen to create mismatches.
tactics_zh: Aces Horns 变体：弱侧 flare + 高位二次掩护
Fever 5-out：清空内线，借助二次掩护制造错位

clutchTimeline.event_en: Aces high handoff, corner three missed
clutchTimeline.event_zh: Aces 高位 handoff，底角三分不中
